roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:MATTER TRAILING 20011489/INTC/X: AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE PEOPLE MOVE TO DISMISS THIS CASE PURSUANT TO PC 1385,/MO GRTD/CTORD:ACM IS RELIEVED/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANY RESTITUTION OR OTHER MATTERS RESULTING FROM DISMISSED CHARGES MAY BEADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COURT NO,20011861,/EMTERM/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/987,2/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/ACM/WS/SA2:AREA BOUNDED BY GEARY BLVD, MCALLISTER ST, LARKIN ST & JONES ST, SF CA/SAORD3/SAORD/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPSDEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ONTHE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/NTW/CAUSE1/LDPX:01-13-21 (30TH DAY)/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
